title: Osteoporosis risk review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

treatment_and_management.text: Supports detailed risk history, fragility-fracture context, falls risk, FRAX and BMD context, and monitoring of treatment effects.
treatment_and_management.rationale: The exact section supports clinician-reviewed fracture-risk, falls and BMD context plus completed functional assessment without auto-calculating FRAX.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports detailed risk history, fragility-fracture context, falls risk, FRAX and BMD context, and monitoring of treatment effects.

source.title: DOH Guidelines on Screening for Osteoporosis

medication.text: Supports documenting falls, low calcium or vitamin D context, low weight, smoking or alcohol, medicine context, personal or family fracture history, and secondary causes.
medication.rationale: The exact Abu Dhabi section supports documenting falls, low weight, smoking or alcohol, medicine, personal or family fracture history and secondary-cause context without assigning osteoporosis.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports documenting falls, low calcium or vitamin D context, low weight, smoking or alcohol, medicine context, personal or family fracture history, and secondary causes.

source.title: DOH Guidelines on Screening for Osteoporosis

follow_up.text: Supports clinician-reviewed DEXA reporting with age and risk qualifiers and without independently assigning a diagnosis.
follow_up.rationale: The exact section supports documenting clinician-reviewed DEXA information and entered follow-up without independently interpreting or diagnosing.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-reviewed DEXA reporting with age and risk qualifiers and without independently assigning a diagnosis.

source.title: DOH Guidelines on Screening for Osteoporosis

source_limitations: Exact age and sex threshold, measured risk, fracture details, DEXA result, diagnosis, medicine, dose, and follow-up interval remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
